channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Samsung forgot some important buttons on the Galaxy S26 series. Here's how to fix that problem
item.description: Pitaka's latest cases include three customizable buttons that make your Samsung Galaxy S26 series phone even more advanced.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra wearing a blue Pitaka Edge case
media:content.media:text: A Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra wearing a blue Pitaka Edge case
media:content.media:title: A Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra wearing a blue Pitaka Edge case

item.title: Gemini for Home is finally expanding to more countries, and you can try it now
item.description: The update brings Gemini to new regions along with improved smart home performance.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: <p><br></p>
media:content.media:text: Google Nest Audio
media:content.media:title: Google Nest Audio

item.title: I've finally found a premium Meta Quest 3 headstrap that doesn't suck
item.description: I'm taking a look at the best premium headstrap for the Meta Quest 3 and Quest 3S today, and it'll not only improve your comfort but also your play time.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A BoboVR S3 Pro installed on a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:text: A BoboVR S3 Pro installed on a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:title: A BoboVR S3 Pro installed on a Meta Quest 3 headset

item.title: US Mobile's upcoming plan sounds easier on wallet, and comes with satellite home internet
item.description: US Mobile is teasing a new plan that bundles cellular service with Starlink satellite internet.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: US Mobile SIM cards
media:content.media:text: US Mobile SIM cards
media:content.media:title: US Mobile SIM cards

item.title: Wait no more: TCL's e-paper NXTPAPER 70 Pro is at T-Mobile for cheap
item.description: TCL confirmed that its NXTPAPER 70 Pro is available at T-Mobile with its paper-like display for eye health at a cheap price point.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro
media:content.media:text: TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro
media:content.media:title: TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro

item.title: Wood you buy it? Moto Razr Ultra 2026 has a pair of alternative finishes in this leak
item.description: Moto's Razr Ultra 2026 was involved in another leak that highlighted its unique and different finishes (yes, one is made of wood).
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Holding the Razr Ultra 2025 in hand
media:content.media:text: Holding the Razr Ultra 2025 in hand
media:content.media:title: Holding the Razr Ultra 2025 in hand

item.title: T-Mobile will apparently give you a free Pixel phone AND some earbuds this month — here's how to claim yours
item.description: T-Mobile will now give you a free Google Pixel 10a and a pair of Pixel Buds 2a earbuds when you add a line with "most plans" on the carrier's site.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.

item.title: Back from the dead: Samsung's Galaxy Z TriFold makes an unexpected comeback
item.description: The Galaxy Z TriFold is back on sale starting April 10, but inventory may be limited.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central

item.title: This stylish Bluetooth speaker has four features you won't find anywhere else
item.description: Teenage Engineering's OB-4 is a Bluetooth speaker with exquisite styling, but that isn't why it stands out. The real reason is that it has plenty of unique features that you don't get anywhere else.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Teenage Engineering OB-4 review
media:content.media:text: Teenage Engineering OB-4 review
media:content.media:title: Teenage Engineering OB-4 review

item.title: The reMarkable 2 remains one of the best paper-style tablets around, and it just scored a rare discount at Best Buy
item.description: The reMarkable 2 comes with a nice polymer weave book folio case and the Marker Plus digital pen.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Close-up of note-taking on the Remarkable 2
media:content.media:text: Close-up of note-taking on the Remarkable 2
media:content.media:title: Close-up of note-taking on the Remarkable 2

item.title: Podcasts meet Spotify's Prompted Playlists for curious Premium US beta testers
item.description: Spotify rolled out the availability of podcasts in its Prompted Playlists beta for Premium users.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Spotify's Prompted Playlists beta now includes podcasts for users interested in listening to shows, not music.
media:content.media:text: Spotify's Prompted Playlists beta now includes podcasts for users interested in listening to shows, not music.
media:content.media:title: Spotify's Prompted Playlists beta now includes podcasts for users interested in listening to shows, not music.

item.title: Stuffcool made a 65W GaN charger with a retractable cable, and it's pretty good
item.description: Stuffcool's Zeno 65W is a GaN charger with a retractable cable. I used it for just over three months, and it does a great job as a travel charger.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Stuffcool Zeno 65
media:content.media:text: Stuffcool Zeno 65
media:content.media:title: Stuffcool Zeno 65

item.title: Just got a new Galaxy S26? Here are the first 6 things you should do with it
item.description: With the Galaxy S26 out, here are some tips and tricks to help you get started with Samsung's latest smartphone.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra

item.title: Google's $135M Android data settlement is getting closer, and you can now set your payout method
item.description: Eligible Android users in the U.S. can now file claims for the ongoing settlement.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: A photo of the Google Logo surrounded by plants at the company's NYC headquarters building
media:content.media:text: A photo of the Google Logo surrounded by plants at the company's NYC headquarters building
media:content.media:title: A photo of the Google Logo surrounded by plants at the company's NYC headquarters building

item.title: There's no doubt — the OnePlus Nord 6 is the battery champion of 2026
item.description: With a power bank-sized 9,000mAh battery, the Nord 6 lasts two days with ease. Combine that with powerful internals and good software, and you get a great mid-range phone.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: OnePlus Nord 6 review photos
media:content.media:text: OnePlus Nord 6 review photos
media:content.media:title: OnePlus Nord 6 review photos

item.title: New Mint Mobile deal gets you a full year of 5G internet AND unlimited wireless for only 45 bucks per month — this isn't a joke
item.description: Mint has launched a bundle deal that gets you a year of 5G Home Internet and T-Mobile-powered wireless for only $45 per month
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Mint Mobile sim card
media:content.media:text: Mint Mobile sim card
media:content.media:title: Mint Mobile sim card

item.title: Niantic Spatial maps reality with 'machine-readable' data, so AI sees the world as you do
item.description: Niantic Spatial's latest product launches enhance what's possible with "machine-readable" data for AI's world mapping.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Niantic Spatial logo.
media:content.media:text: The Niantic Spatial logo.
media:content.media:title: The Niantic Spatial logo.

item.title: Galaxy XR's 'key' Android Enterprise update makes it viable in healthcare and retail
item.description: Galaxy XR's major April update added Android Enterprise support, which could see it entering real-world industries.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: A close-up photo of the Samsung Galaxy XR headset sitting on a pedestal, angled to the front-right.
media:content.media:text: A close-up photo of the Samsung Galaxy XR headset sitting on a pedestal, angled to the front-right.
media:content.media:title: A close-up photo of the Samsung Galaxy XR headset sitting on a pedestal, angled to the front-right.

item.title: Ready to ditch cable? This YouTube TV deal just made it easier by slashing $45 OFF your first three months of service
item.description: YouTube TV is the most popular and well-regarded live TV streaming service on the web, and it just got a little cheaper for new members.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: YouTube TV app on a smart TV
media:content.media:text: YouTube TV app on a smart TV
media:content.media:title: YouTube TV app on a smart TV

item.title: One company just teased the E Ink phone of my dreams, and it's fully powered by Android
item.description: Bigme is teasing a new dual-screen E Ink phone that also sports an LCD panel, and it's the world's first phone of its kind.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A Bigme HiBreak Pro Color on a tea tray with its home screen illuminated by sunlight
media:content.media:text: A Bigme HiBreak Pro Color on a tea tray with its home screen illuminated by sunlight
media:content.media:title: A Bigme HiBreak Pro Color on a tea tray with its home screen illuminated by sunlight

item.title: Motorola heard my plea, and the new Moto G Stylus 2026 might be the affordable Galaxy S26 Ultra we've been waiting for
item.description: Motorola launches the Moto G Stylus 2026, which features an upgraded active stylus pen, a larger battery, a brighter display, and enticing launch bundles.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Moto G Stylus 2026 in both colors
media:content.media:text: The Moto G Stylus 2026 in both colors
media:content.media:title: The Moto G Stylus 2026 in both colors

item.title: Motorola and T-Mobile are bringing a new 5G tablet to the US, and it looks like it'll be easy on my wallet
item.description: Motorola's new tablet, the Moto Pad 2026, brings an affordable 5G option to T-Mobile and Metro by T-Mobile customers.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Moto Pad 2026 on a table
media:content.media:text: The Moto Pad 2026 on a table
media:content.media:title: The Moto Pad 2026 on a table

item.title: I’ve been waiting years for Google Photos to get this one basic feature — and it's finally here
item.description: Google Photos finally adds video speed controls on Android, letting you watch clips at 0.5x to 2x.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Photos on a Pixel 6 Pro
media:content.media:text: Google Photos on a Pixel 6 Pro
media:content.media:title: Google Photos on a Pixel 6 Pro

item.title: Caught in a loop: Google's March update causes booting issues for its Pixels
item.description: Pixel users across the board have started reporting issues with the latest March security patch.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central

item.title: I used the Vivo X300 Ultra for a week, and I can't believe a phone camera is this good
item.description: I used the Vivo X300 Ultra as my daily driver, and there's no doubt in my mind that this is the camera phone to beat in 2026. With two 200MP cameras and class-leading video recording, Vivo outdid itself this year.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central

item.title: The Isai Blue Pixel 10a is a stunning anniversary gift you can’t have
item.description: Google’s Pixel 10a gets a stylish Isai Blue makeover with art-driven features and extras, but it’s locked to Japan.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand
media:content.media:text: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand
media:content.media:title: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 is a solid phone that desperately needs a camera upgrade
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 is more expensive and offers a bigger screen, but is that enough? Without new cameras or magnetic charging, I'm not sure it is.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.

item.title: Best Buy is now slashing up to $300 off the Galaxy S26 lineup when you buy unlocked — who needs Amazon?
item.description: Best Buy has quietly begun discounting the Galaxy S26 lineup on its site, no strings attached.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)

item.title: I'm obsessed with these over-the-top MagSafe wallets from SUPCASE and i-Blason
item.description: These boisterous SUPCASE and i-Blason MagSafe wallets are upgraded to the max. Equipped with stands and RFID blockers, some even have Bluetooth tracker slots!
